title: partner
description: This mod can make your gaming experience better, allowing you to experience the feeling of companionship instead of loneliness
body:
Meet your faithful companion! Trade with the Wandering Trader to obtain Creature Eggs. Use these eggs to summon a loyal partner who will fight by your side and join you on your adventures. Tame female companions with a Cherry Sapling or Cherry Leaves, and male companions with Bamboo.
This mod does not have a pre installed mod, you can simply install it to play. Low performance requirements will not consume too many performance resources, it needs to run on the 1.20.1 version of Minecraft Forge
There are no other requirements for this module. It can run on both the server and personal end
